requirement_topic.en: EMC Emissions — AS/NZS CISPR 11 & RCM Framework
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容发射——AS/NZS CISPR 11与RCM合规框架
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容發射——AS/NZS CISPR 11與RCM合規框架

summary.en: Grid-tied PV inverters supplied in Australia must comply with the EMC framework administered by the Australian Communications and Media Authority (ACMA) under the Radiocommunications Act 1992 and the Telecommunications Act 1997. The Regulatory Compliance Mark (RCM) is the mandatory market-access mark covering both electrical safety and EMC. For industrial scientific and medical (ISM) equipment including PV inverters, the primary EMC emissions standard is AS CISPR 11:2024 (current edition, adopted from CISPR 11:2024 — Industrial, Scientific and Medical Equipment: Radio-Frequency Disturbance Characteristics, Limits and Methods of Measurement). Inverters are typically classified as Group 1 Class A or Class B equipment under CISPR 11 depending on installation environment. Compliance evidence must be held by the Responsible Supplier registered with ACMA. RCM registration requirements are published by ACMA at acma.gov.au (five-step supplier compliance process).
summary.zh: 在澳大利亚供应的并网光伏逆变器须符合澳大利亚通信与媒体管理局（ACMA）依据《1992年无线电通信法》及《1997年电信法》管理的电磁兼容框架。法规符合性标志（RCM）为涵盖电气安全及电磁兼容的强制性市场准入标志。对于包括光伏逆变器在内的工业、科学及医疗（ISM）设备，主要适用的电磁兼容发射标准为AS CISPR 11:2024（当前版本，采纳自CISPR 11:2024——工业、科学及医疗设备：射频骚扰特性，限值及测量方法）。逆变器通常依据CISPR 11按安装环境分类为第1组A级或B级设备。合规证明须由在ACMA注册的责任供应商持有。RCM注册要求由ACMA在acma.gov.au发布（供应商合规五步流程）。
summary.zht: 在澳大利亞供應的並網光伏逆變器須符合澳大利亞通訊與媒體管理局（ACMA）依據《1992年無線電通訊法》及《1997年電信法》管理的電磁相容框架。法規符合性標誌（RCM）為涵蓋電氣安全及電磁相容的強制性市場準入標誌。對於包括光伏逆變器在內的工業、科學及醫療（ISM）設備，主要適用的電磁相容發射標準為AS CISPR 11:2024（當前版本，採納自CISPR 11:2024——工業、科學及醫療設備：射頻騷擾特性，限值及測量方法）。逆變器通常依據CISPR 11按安裝環境分類為第1組A級或B級設備。合規證明須由在ACMA登記的責任供應商持有。RCM登記要求由ACMA在acma.gov.au發布（供應商合規五步流程）。

standards_or_laws: AS CISPR 11:2024 (EMC emissions — ISM equipment, Group 1 Class A/B; current adopted edition as of June 2026)
ACMA RCM (Regulatory Compliance Mark) registration requirement

summary.en: In China, EMC emissions compliance for grid-tied PV inverters is primarily demonstrated through GB 17625.1 (harmonic current emissions, mandatory, equivalent to IEC 61000-3-2) and GB/T 17799.4 (generic emissions, industrial environment, recommended, equivalent to IEC 61000-6-4). Radio-frequency conducted and radiated disturbance limits for ISM equipment are addressed in GB 4824 (equivalent to CISPR 11). EMC testing is typically bundled within the NB/T 32004 PV inverter product standard certification process. GB 4824 is a mandatory national standard (强制性标准).
summary.zh: 在中国，并网光伏逆变器的电磁兼容发射符合性主要通过GB 17625.1（谐波电流发射，强制性标准，等效IEC 61000-3-2）、GB/T 17799.4（通用骚扰发射，工业环境，推荐性标准，等效IEC 61000-6-4）以及GB 4824（ISM设备射频骚扰限值，等效CISPR 11，强制性标准）来证明。电磁兼容测试通常作为NB/T 32004光伏逆变器产品标准认证的一部分进行。
summary.zht: 在中國，並網光伏逆變器的電磁相容發射符合性主要通過GB 17625.1（諧波電流發射，強制性標準，等效IEC 61000-3-2）、GB/T 17799.4（通用騷擾發射，工業環境，推薦性標準，等效IEC 61000-6-4）及GB 4824（ISM設備射頻騷擾限值，等效CISPR 11，強制性標準）來證明。電磁相容測試通常作為NB/T 32004光伏逆變器產品標準認證的一部分進行。

standards_or_laws: GB 4824 (mandatory — ISM equipment EMC emissions, equiv. CISPR 11)
GB 17625.1 (mandatory — harmonic current emissions, equiv. IEC 61000-3-2)
GB/T 17799.4 (recommended — generic emissions, industrial, equiv. IEC 61000-6-4)
NB/T 32004 (PV inverter product standard, includes EMC scope)

gap.en: Both AS/NZS CISPR 11 and GB 4824 are derived from CISPR 11, so the underlying RF disturbance limit framework is technically aligned. Key gaps are procedural and registration-based: (1) RCM registration: the Responsible Supplier must register with ACMA and hold an EMC compliance folder (test reports, declaration) referencing AS/NZS CISPR 11; Chinese CQC or CNEX test reports under GB 4824 are not directly accepted — testing must be conducted by an ILAC-MRA accredited laboratory citing the AS/NZS CISPR 11 edition current at time of supply. (2) Edition currency: verify that the AS/NZS CISPR 11 edition adopted by ACMA matches the CISPR 11 edition used in Chinese GB 4824 tests; limit values and measurement methods may differ between editions. (3) Equipment classification: Chinese GB 4824 Group/Class assignment may not map identically to the AS/NZS CISPR 11 assignment for the same inverter topology — reclassification may be required. (4) Compliance folder retention: ACMA requires the compliance folder to be retained and made available on request; this is a separate administrative obligation from the Chinese CCC/CQC process.
gap.zh: AS/NZS CISPR 11与GB 4824均源自CISPR 11，射频骚扰限值框架在技术上一致。主要差距体现在程序与注册层面：（1）RCM注册：责任供应商须在ACMA注册并持有引用AS/NZS CISPR 11的电磁兼容合规文件夹（检测报告、声明）；中国CQC或CNEX依据GB 4824出具的检测报告不被直接接受，须由引用当前供应时适用的AS/NZS CISPR 11版本的ILAC-MRA认可实验室进行测试。（2）版本现行性：须核实ACMA采纳的AS/NZS CISPR 11版本与中国GB 4824测试所用CISPR 11版本是否一致，不同版本的限值与测量方法可能存在差异。（3）设备分类：中国GB 4824对同一逆变器型号的组别/级别划分可能与AS/NZS CISPR 11不完全对应，或需重新分类。（4）合规文件夹留存：ACMA要求留存合规文件夹并在要求时提供，这是独立于中国CCC/CQC流程的行政义务。
gap.zht: AS/NZS CISPR 11與GB 4824均源自CISPR 11，射頻騷擾限值框架在技術上一致。主要差距體現在程序與登記層面：（1）RCM登記：責任供應商須在ACMA登記並持有引用AS/NZS CISPR 11的電磁相容合規文件夾（檢測報告、聲明）；中國CQC或CNEX依據GB 4824出具的檢測報告不被直接接受，須由引用當前供應時適用的AS/NZS CISPR 11版本的ILAC-MRA認可實驗室進行測試。（2）版本現行性：須核實ACMA採納的AS/NZS CISPR 11版本與中國GB 4824測試所用CISPR 11版本是否一致，不同版本的限值與測量方法可能存在差異。（3）設備分類：中國GB 4824對同一逆變器型號的組別/級別劃分可能與AS/NZS CISPR 11不完全對應，或需重新分類。（4）合規文件夾留存：ACMA要求留存合規文件夾並在要求時提供，這是獨立於中國CCC/CQC流程的行政義務。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — RCM EMC compliance required under Radiocommunications Act 1992 (Cth) and ACMA EMC framework
mandatory_status.cn: GB 4824 is mandatory (强制性); GB/T 17799.4 is recommended (推荐性); GB 17625.1 is mandatory (强制性)

compliance_verdict.en: Chinese GB 4824 test data provides a useful technical baseline given the shared CISPR 11 heritage, but cannot be used directly for RCM compliance. The Responsible Supplier must register with ACMA, hold an EMC compliance folder containing test reports from an ILAC-MRA accredited laboratory citing AS CISPR 11:2024 (current adopted edition), and issue a supplier declaration of conformity before affixing the RCM mark. Edition alignment (GB 4824 may reference an earlier CISPR 11 edition) and Group/Class reclassification should be verified before relying on existing Chinese test data.
compliance_verdict.zh: 鉴于GB 4824与CISPR 11具有共同技术渊源，相关检测数据可提供有用的技术基准，但不可直接用于RCM合规。责任供应商须在ACMA注册，持有由ILAC-MRA认可实验室引用AS CISPR 11:2024（当前采纳版本）出具的检测报告的电磁兼容合规文件夹，并在加贴RCM标志前出具供应商符合性声明。在引用现有中国检测数据前，须核实版本一致性（GB 4824可能引用早期CISPR 11版本）及组别/级别分类。
compliance_verdict.zht: 鑑於GB 4824與CISPR 11具有共同技術淵源，相關檢測數據可提供有用的技術基準，但不可直接用於RCM合規。責任供應商須在ACMA登記，持有由ILAC-MRA認可實驗室引用AS CISPR 11:2024（當前採納版本）出具的檢測報告的電磁相容合規文件夾，並在加貼RCM標誌前出具供應商符合性聲明。在引用現有中國檢測數據前，須核實版本一致性（GB 4824可能引用早期CISPR 11版本）及組別/級別分類。

requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容抗扰度——AS/NZS 61000-6-2与RCM合规框架
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容抗擾度——AS/NZS 61000-6-2與RCM合規框架

summary.en: Grid-tied PV inverters installed in industrial environments in Australia must meet generic immunity requirements under the ACMA EMC framework. The applicable standard is AS/NZS 61000.6.2:2022 (Electromagnetic Compatibility — Generic Standards — Immunity for Industrial Environments), which is Australia/New Zealand's adoption of IEC 61000-6-2:2016 RLV (Ed. 3.0) with modifications. This standard superseded the 2006 edition and was published in October 2022. It covers immunity to conducted and radiated RF disturbances, electrostatic discharge (ESD), electrical fast transients, surges, and power frequency magnetic fields relevant to inverters operating in industrial settings. Compliance is demonstrated through ILAC-MRA accredited laboratory testing and is documented in the EMC compliance folder held by the RCM-registered Responsible Supplier.
summary.zh: 安装于澳大利亚工业环境的并网光伏逆变器须符合ACMA电磁兼容框架下的通用抗扰度要求。适用标准为AS/NZS 61000.6.2:2022（电磁兼容——通用标准——工业环境抗扰度），即澳大利亚/新西兰对IEC 61000-6-2:2016 RLV（第3版）的修改采纳版本，于2022年10月发布，取代2006年版本。该标准涵盖传导和辐射射频骚扰抗扰度、静电放电（ESD）、电气快速瞬变、浪涌及工频磁场等逆变器在工业环境运行的相关抗扰度项目。合规性通过ILAC-MRA认可实验室测试证明，并记录于RCM注册责任供应商持有的电磁兼容合规文件夹中。
summary.zht: 安裝於澳大利亞工業環境的並網光伏逆變器須符合ACMA電磁相容框架下的通用抗擾度要求。適用標準為AS/NZS 61000.6.2:2022（電磁相容——通用標準——工業環境抗擾度），即澳大利亞/新西蘭對IEC 61000-6-2:2016 RLV（第3版）的修改採納版本，於2022年10月發布，取代2006年版本。該標準涵蓋傳導和輻射射頻騷擾抗擾度、靜電放電（ESD）、電氣快速瞬變、浪湧及工頻磁場等逆變器在工業環境運行的相關抗擾度項目。合規性通過ILAC-MRA認可實驗室測試證明，並記錄於RCM登記責任供應商持有的電磁相容合規文件夾中。

standards_or_laws: AS/NZS 61000.6.2:2022 (EMC immunity — industrial environment, modified adoption of IEC 61000-6-2:2016 RLV Ed. 3.0; supersedes 2006 edition)
ACMA RCM (Regulatory Compliance Mark) registration requirement

summary.en: In China, generic immunity requirements for industrial-environment equipment including grid-tied PV inverters are addressed through GB/T 17799.2 (generic immunity, industrial environment, a recommended standard equivalent to IEC 61000-6-2). Additional immunity requirements specific to PV inverters at the grid connection point are set out in GB/T 19939 and the NB/T 32004 inverter product standard. GB/T 17799.2 is a recommended national standard (推荐性标准) and is typically tested as part of the NB/T 32004 certification process.
summary.zh: 在中国，包括并网光伏逆变器在内的工业环境设备的通用抗扰度要求通过GB/T 17799.2（通用抗扰度，工业环境，推荐性标准，等效IEC 61000-6-2）加以规范。并网点光伏逆变器的附加抗扰度要求见GB/T 19939及NB/T 32004逆变器产品标准。GB/T 17799.2为推荐性国家标准，通常作为NB/T 32004认证的一部分进行测试。
summary.zht: 在中國，包括並網光伏逆變器在內的工業環境設備的通用抗擾度要求通過GB/T 17799.2（通用抗擾度，工業環境，推薦性標準，等效IEC 61000-6-2）加以規範。並網點光伏逆變器的附加抗擾度要求見GB/T 19939及NB/T 32004逆變器產品標準。GB/T 17799.2為推薦性國家標準，通常作為NB/T 32004認證的一部分進行測試。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 17799.2 (recommended — generic immunity, industrial environment, equiv. IEC 61000-6-2)
NB/T 32004 (PV inverter product standard, includes immunity scope)

gap.en: Both AS/NZS 61000-6-2 and GB/T 17799.2 are derived from IEC 61000-6-2, so the immunity test portfolio and performance criteria are largely aligned. Key gaps: (1) Mandatory vs recommended: AS/NZS 61000-6-2 immunity compliance is required for RCM registration in Australia; GB/T 17799.2 is a recommended standard, meaning Chinese certification may be based on NB/T 32004 alone without a full GB/T 17799.2 immunity sweep — gaps in test coverage may exist. (2) RCM compliance folder: Australian requirements mandate that test reports reference AS/NZS 61000-6-2 (not IEC 61000-6-2 or GB/T 17799.2 directly); Chinese NB/T 32004 test reports are not directly accepted. (3) Edition currency: verify that the AS/NZS 61000-6-2 edition matches the IEC 61000-6-2 edition used in Chinese GB/T 17799.2 tests; performance criteria levels (e.g., surge immunity Level 3 vs Level 4) should be confirmed. (4) ACMA compliance folder administration: the Responsible Supplier must be an Australian entity or have an Australian representative registered with ACMA, which is an additional market-entry administrative step not required in China.
gap.zh: AS/NZS 61000-6-2与GB/T 17799.2均源自IEC 61000-6-2，抗扰度测试项目与性能判据大体一致。主要差距：（1）强制性与推荐性：澳大利亚RCM注册要求符合AS/NZS 61000-6-2抗扰度要求；GB/T 17799.2为推荐性标准，中国认证可能仅依据NB/T 32004而未完整覆盖GB/T 17799.2全部抗扰度测试项，可能存在测试覆盖缺口。（2）RCM合规文件夹：澳大利亚要求检测报告引用AS/NZS 61000-6-2（而非直接引用IEC 61000-6-2或GB/T 17799.2），中国NB/T 32004检测报告不被直接接受。（3）版本现行性：须核实AS/NZS 61000-6-2版本与中国GB/T 17799.2测试所用IEC 61000-6-2版本是否一致，应确认性能判据等级（如浪涌抗扰度3级与4级）。（4）ACMA合规文件夹行政管理：责任供应商须为澳大利亚实体或在ACMA登记的澳大利亚代表，这是中国不要求的额外市场准入行政步骤。
gap.zht: AS/NZS 61000-6-2與GB/T 17799.2均源自IEC 61000-6-2，抗擾度測試項目與性能判據大體一致。主要差距：（1）強制性與推薦性：澳大利亞RCM登記要求符合AS/NZS 61000-6-2抗擾度要求；GB/T 17799.2為推薦性標準，中國認證可能僅依據NB/T 32004而未完整覆蓋GB/T 17799.2全部抗擾度測試項，可能存在測試覆蓋缺口。（2）RCM合規文件夾：澳大利亞要求檢測報告引用AS/NZS 61000-6-2（而非直接引用IEC 61000-6-2或GB/T 17799.2），中國NB/T 32004檢測報告不被直接接受。（3）版本現行性：須核實AS/NZS 61000-6-2版本與中國GB/T 17799.2測試所用IEC 61000-6-2版本是否一致，應確認性能判據等級（如浪湧抗擾度3級與4級）。（4）ACMA合規文件夾行政管理：責任供應商須為澳大利亞實體或在ACMA登記的澳大利亞代表，這是中國不要求的額外市場準入行政步驟。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — required for RCM registration under Radiocommunications Act 1992 (Cth) and ACMA EMC framework
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 17799.2 is recommended (推荐性); immunity coverage under NB/T 32004 is de facto required for grid-connection certification

compliance_verdict.en: Chinese GB/T 17799.2 / NB/T 32004 immunity test data provides a useful technical starting point given the shared IEC 61000-6-2 heritage, but cannot substitute for RCM compliance. Manufacturers must obtain ILAC-MRA accredited laboratory test reports citing AS/NZS 61000-6-2, verify edition-level performance criteria alignment, ensure full test coverage of all immunity phenomena required by the AS/NZS standard, register the Responsible Supplier with ACMA, and maintain a compliant EMC compliance folder before affixing the RCM mark.
compliance_verdict.zh: 鉴于GB/T 17799.2/NB/T 32004与IEC 61000-6-2具有共同技术渊源，相关抗扰度测试数据可提供有用的技术起点，但不可替代RCM合规。制造商须取得由ILAC-MRA认可实验室引用AS/NZS 61000-6-2出具的检测报告，核实版本层级性能判据的一致性，确保覆盖AS/NZS标准要求的全部抗扰度测试项目，在ACMA登记责任供应商，并在加贴RCM标志前维护合规的电磁兼容合规文件夹。
compliance_verdict.zht: 鑑於GB/T 17799.2/NB/T 32004與IEC 61000-6-2具有共同技術淵源，相關抗擾度測試數據可提供有用的技術起點，但不可替代RCM合規。製造商須取得由ILAC-MRA認可實驗室引用AS/NZS 61000-6-2出具的檢測報告，核實版本層級性能判據的一致性，確保覆蓋AS/NZS標準要求的全部抗擾度測試項目，在ACMA登記責任供應商，並在加貼RCM標誌前維護合規的電磁相容合規文件夾。
